metadata.analysis: UI gap analysis performed 2026-03-16 against all spec modules

plan.title: DEFT Evolution — Admin UI Completeness & User-Facing Gaps
plan.author: gap-analysis-agent

narratives.Overview: Fills 15 UI gaps identified by cross-referencing all four spec modules (SPECIFICATION.md, SPECIFICATION-io-channels.md, SPECIFICATION-reporting.md, SPECIFICATION-rbac-user-tiers.md) against the current Next.js frontend. All backend endpoints already exist — this module adds only frontend pages and components to complete the specified surface area.
narratives.Background: All backend phases have been fully implemented. However, several admin and user-facing pages specified in the original SPECIFICATION.md and io-channels spec were never built on the frontend. The gap analysis identified 5 high-severity missing pages (admin user detail, admin settings, admin security, upgrade flow, user profile), 5 medium gaps (RBAC policy UI, API/LLM usage stats, exports UI, widget preview, phone number management), and 5 minor issues (platform stats, per-org branding, chatbot widget verification, naming inconsistency, /reports redirect).
narratives.Constraint: All backend endpoints already exist — no new Go code required unless a bug is found. The /upgrade page must use the existing POST /v1/me/upgrade endpoint. Admin pages must enforce platform_admin check via existing middleware. ≥85% test coverage on all new TypeScript code.
narratives.Risk: User impersonation UI touches auth flow — ensure impersonation token is handled securely (no localStorage). Admin security pages display PII (IPs, login events) — RBAC check must be confirmed before render. Phone number purchase flow involves real billing — must be clearly labeled and confirmation-gated.
narratives.Alternative: Considered splitting into separate frontend-only phases per domain (admin, user, channels). Rejected: all gaps are relatively small, single-phase keeps implementation simple and allows one agent to own the full surface area.

decisions.test_strategy: Vitest component tests + Playwright E2E for critical flows
decisions.admin_pages: all under /admin/* with platform_admin enforcement via existing middleware
decisions.upgrade_page: self-service stub calling POST /v1/me/upgrade — billing UI deferred
decisions.impersonation: token stored only in memory / session, never localStorage
decisions.phone_numbers: confirmation modal before purchase; clearly labeled as billable action
decisions.naming_fix: rename tier4-home-screen.tsx and tier6-home-screen.tsx to tier-4-home.tsx and tier-6-home.tsx to match project hyphen convention

narrative.Overview: Route /admin/users/[user_id] with full user detail: cross-org memberships table, ban/unban toggle, GDPR purge with confirmation dialog, and time-limited impersonation token button. Uses GET /v1/admin/users/{user_id}, POST /v1/admin/users/{user_id}/ban|unban|purge|impersonate.

subItems.title: Create app/admin/users/[user_id]/page.tsx Server Component fetching user detail from GET /v1/admin/users/{user_id}
Create components/admin/user-detail.tsx: profile card, cross-org memberships table, ban status badge
Ban/unban toggle button with reason input. GDPR purge button with confirmation dialog (type org name). Both audit-logged.
Impersonate button: calls POST /v1/admin/users/{user_id}/impersonate, stores token in sessionStorage only, shows countdown timer (max 2h), clear button
Link from /admin/users list rows to /admin/users/[user_id]
Vitest: user-detail renders membership table, ban button toggles state. E2E: navigate from user list to detail, ban user, confirm 403 on API call. Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Route /admin/settings with a JSON deep-merge editor for platform-wide settings. Uses GET/PATCH /v1/admin/settings. Displays current settings as a structured form (or editable JSON with validation). Add nav link in admin sidebar.

subItems.title: Create app/admin/settings/page.tsx fetching current settings from GET /v1/admin/settings
Create components/admin/system-settings.tsx: key-value form with type inference (string/number/bool/JSON). Save calls PATCH /v1/admin/settings with deep-merge semantics.
Add Settings link to admin sidebar nav section
Vitest: system-settings form renders and submits. Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Route /admin/security with two tabs: Recent Logins (GET /v1/admin/security/recent-logins) and Failed Auths (GET /v1/admin/security/failed-auths). Both are paginated tables showing user ID, IP, user agent, timestamp. Add nav link in admin sidebar.

subItems.title: Create app/admin/security/page.tsx with Tabs: Recent Logins | Failed Auths
Create components/admin/security-log.tsx: paginated table with user ID (links to user detail), IP, user agent, timestamp. Shared by both tabs.
Add Security link to admin sidebar nav section
Vitest: security-log table renders rows correctly. Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Route /upgrade for the Tier 2 upgrade CTA destination. Displays plan comparison (Tier 2 vs Tier 3), calls POST /v1/me/upgrade on confirm. Billing is a stub (no real payment form yet — shows 'contact sales' or a trial activation). On success, invalidates tier cache and redirects to home. UpgradeCTAWidget should link here.

subItems.title: Create app/upgrade/page.tsx: plan comparison layout, upgrade benefits list, CTA button
Create components/home/upgrade-page.tsx: plan comparison cards, feature checklist, UpgradeButton (calls POST /v1/me/upgrade, invalidates useTier cache, redirects)
Update UpgradeCTAWidget href to point to /upgrade
Vitest: upgrade-page renders plan cards, button calls upgrade endpoint. Coverage ≥85%.

items.title: Task 5: User Profile / Account Settings Page

narrative.Overview: Route /settings for the authenticated user. Sections: Profile (Clerk UserProfile component), Notification preferences (links to /notifications/preferences), API Keys (list/create/revoke personal API keys via existing /v1/auth/api-keys endpoints), current tier display. Accessible from topbar user menu.

subItems.title: Create app/settings/page.tsx with sections: Profile, Notifications, API Keys, Current Tier
Embed Clerk <UserProfile> component for name/email/password management
Create components/settings/api-keys.tsx: list keys (masked), create new key (show once modal), revoke with confirmation
Show current tier badge with label and description using useTier()
Add Settings link to topbar user menu (Clerk UserButton afterSignOutUrl or custom menu item)
Vitest: api-keys list renders, create modal shows key once, revoke removes row. Coverage ≥85%.

items.title: Task 6: Admin RBAC Policy Management UI

narrative.Overview: Route /admin/rbac-policy. Displays current RBAC policy (GET /v1/admin/rbac-policy) as an editable YAML/JSON form. PATCH saves updates. Dry-run preview: POST /v1/admin/rbac-policy/preview — allows input of (user_id, entity_id, entity_type) and shows resolved role without saving.

subItems.title: Create app/admin/rbac-policy/page.tsx with policy editor and dry-run section
Create components/admin/rbac-policy-editor.tsx: displays policy as structured form. Save calls PATCH.
Create components/admin/rbac-policy-preview.tsx: form inputs for user_id/entity/type, shows resolved role on submit via POST /v1/admin/rbac-policy/preview
Add RBAC Policy link to admin sidebar
Vitest: editor renders policy, preview form submits and displays result. Coverage ≥85%.

items.title: Task 7: Admin API Usage & LLM Usage Stats Pages

narrative.Overview: Two new admin pages: /admin/api-usage (per-endpoint request counts for 24h/7d/30d from GET /v1/admin/api-usage) and /admin/llm-usage (LLM enrichment call log from GET /v1/admin/llm-usage). Both are read-only data tables with time-window selector.

subItems.title: Create app/admin/api-usage/page.tsx: table of endpoint × count with 24h/7d/30d toggle
Create app/admin/llm-usage/page.tsx: table of LLM calls (model, tokens, latency, thread_id, timestamp)
Add API Usage and LLM Usage links to admin sidebar under a Monitoring section
Vitest: both tables render with fixture data. Coverage ≥85%.

items.title: Task 8: Admin Async Data Exports UI

narrative.Overview: Route /admin/exports. POST /v1/admin/exports to trigger an async export (type: users|orgs|audit, format: csv|json). Polls GET /v1/admin/exports/{id} for status. Shows download link when complete. Lists recent exports.

subItems.title: Create app/admin/exports/page.tsx: trigger form + export history table
Create components/admin/export-manager.tsx: type/format selectors, Create Export button, status polling (every 3s while pending), download button when ready
Add Exports link to admin sidebar
Vitest: export-manager renders form, polling updates status. Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Enhance the existing /admin page (admin dashboard overview) to surface live platform stats from GET /v1/admin/stats: org count, user count, thread count, DB size, uptime. Display as MetricCard-style KPI row at the top of the admin dashboard.

subItems.title: Create components/admin/platform-stats.tsx: KPI row of 5 metric cards (orgs, users, threads, db_size, uptime) from GET /v1/admin/stats
Add PlatformStats component to top of app/admin/page.tsx above existing nav cards
Vitest: platform-stats renders all 5 metrics. Coverage ≥85%.

items.title: Task 10: Chat Widget Preview & Embed Code Copy

narrative.Overview: Enhance the existing channel config form for the chat channel (/admin/channels/chat) to add: (1) live widget preview panel showing the floating chat button + open panel with configured theme/greeting, (2) embed code snippet with copy-to-clipboard button, (3) test chat in preview mode (sends to a test thread, not production leads).

subItems.title: Create components/admin/chat-widget-preview.tsx: renders an iframe or shadow-DOM simulation of the widget with live theme/greeting from form state
Add embed code snippet section to channel-config-form.tsx for chat type: generated from org embed key, copy button via navigator.clipboard
Add preview + embed code panels to /admin/channels/chat config page layout
Vitest: preview renders with theme props, copy button calls clipboard API. Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Route /admin/channels/voice/numbers. Lists org's provisioned LiveKit phone numbers (GET /v1/orgs/{org}/channels/voice/numbers). Search available numbers by area code (POST .../numbers/search). Purchase flow with confirmation modal (POST .../numbers/purchase). Shows dispatch rule assignment status.

subItems.title: Create app/admin/channels/voice/numbers/page.tsx
Create components/admin/phone-number-manager.tsx: owned numbers list, search form (area code input), search results table, Purchase button with confirmation modal (clearly labeled as billable)
Add link to phone numbers from /admin/channels/voice config page
Vitest: phone-number-manager renders numbers list, search triggers API call, confirmation modal appears before purchase. Coverage ≥85%.

items.title: Task 12: In-App Chatbot Widget Verification & Fix

narrative.Overview: The RBAC tiers spec requires a ChatbotWidget (async dynamic import, floating bubble → panel, visible on all pages). Phase 6 merged 'Tasks 6.3-6.6' suggesting 6.1 (ChatbotWidget component) and 6.2 (chat endpoint) may be incomplete. Verify presence, implement missing parts, ensure widget appears in app shell for all tiers.

subItems.title: Audit components/ for chatbot-widget.tsx. If missing, implement ChatbotWidget: dynamic import, Clerk anon token, floating bubble → expandable panel, POST /v1/chat/message
Add ChatbotWidget (dynamic import, no SSR) to AppLayoutWrapper so it appears on all authenticated and public pages
Vitest: ChatbotWidget renders bubble, opens panel on click, sends message. Coverage ≥85%.

narrative.Overview: Two small correctness fixes: (1) rename tier home screen files to match project hyphen convention; (2) verify /reports/page.tsx actually redirects to /reports/support.

subItems.title: Rename tier4-home-screen.tsx → tier-4-home.tsx and tier6-home-screen.tsx → tier-6-home.tsx (and test files). Update all imports.
Verify app/reports/page.tsx uses redirect('/reports/support'). If not, add it.
Confirm all existing tests still pass after rename. Coverage ≥85%.
